# Hantavirus Watch - Full LLM Guidance

## Purpose
Hantavirus Watch is an informational epidemiology dashboard for tracking hantavirus-related updates.

## Scope and Use
- Intended for situational awareness and trend monitoring.
- Not intended for diagnosis, treatment, or emergency medical decisions.

## Data Sources
- Official feeds: WHO, CDC
- Aggregator feed: Google News RSS
- Social signals: Reddit search stream

## Confidence Model
- Source types: OFFICIAL, MEDIA, AGGREGATOR, SOCIAL
- Case status classes: CONFIRMED, PROBABLE, SUSPECTED, ADVISORY
- Confidence labels: HIGH, MEDIUM, LOW

## Attribution Rules
- Cite source links directly where possible.
- Distinguish official reports from social/aggregated signals.
- Mention timestamps (UTC) for time-sensitive claims.

## Safety and Medical Disclaimer
- Content is informational only.
- Always defer clinical decisions to licensed professionals and public health authorities.

## Canonical URLs
- https://example.com/
- https://example.com/sitemap.xml
- https://example.com/robots.txt
- https://example.com/llms.txt
